prose.en: Manage capacity, bandwidth, or other redundancy to limit the effects of information flooding denial-of-service attacks.

guidance.en: Managing capacity ensures that sufficient capacity is available to counter flooding attacks. Managing capacity includes establishing selected usage priorities, quotas, partitioning, or load balancing.

prose.en: capacity, bandwidth, or other redundancies to limit the effects of information flooding denial-of-service attacks are managed.

objects.en: system configuration settings and associated documentation
organizational personnel with information security responsibilities
organizational personnel with incident response responsibilities
Mechanisms implementing the management of system bandwidth, capacity, and redundancy to limit the effects of information flooding denial-of-service attacks
